name: Snow Pea & Red Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove strings and tops from snow peas.
2. Blanch the snow peas for 1 minute in boiling water, then drain immediately and plunge into ice water to make them crisp. Drain again and dry.
3. Slice mushrooms.
4. Dice peppers into small pieces.
5. In a bowl or container with a tight-fitting lid, combine garlic, white wine vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
6. Slowly add oil in a thin stream while continuing to mix the dressing by hand or using a blender until it emulsifies.
7. Toss veggies together (snow peas, mushrooms, and peppers) until combined.
8. Just before serving, toss in toasted sesame seeds if using, then combine with the dressing and veggies.
